questionHtml:
Which electrons are removed from iron (Z = 26) to form iron(II)?

A. two 3d electrons

B. two 4s electrons

C. one 4s electron and one 3d electron

D. two 4p electrons

meta.title: Which electrons are removed from iron (Z = 26) to form iron(II)? A. two 3d electrons B. two 4s electrons C. one 4s electron and one 3d electron D. two 4p electrons
